title: AVA Commit Log Entry
description: Schema for a single retired-instruction entry in the AVA commit log. Produced by both the Spike ISS golden model and the Verilator RTL DUT. All agents (Agent D comparator, Agent H red team) must conform to this schema when reading or writing commit logs.

pc.description: Program counter at instruction retirement. Hex string with '0x' prefix. Width: 8 hex digits for RV32, 16 for RV64.

instr.description: Raw 32-bit instruction word as hex string. Compressed (16-bit) instructions are zero-extended to 32 bits.

rd.description: Destination register written by this instruction. Empty string if no register is written (e.g. stores, branches). ABI names are NOT used; use x0–x31 / f0–f31.

rd_val.description: Value written to rd after retirement. Empty string when rd is empty. Hex string with '0x' prefix.
